text_block_list.text:
On the day of the most honorable 
horsegirl festival, the Japan Derby —

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Meijiro Bright really shines on the longer 
tracks! She's totally gonna do way 
better here than in the Satsuki Sho…!

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I really want Stay Gold to do her best 
today. I've become interested in her 
feats ever since her performance at 
the Satsuki Sho…

It's finally the day of the Japan Derby… 
I may just be a mere trainer, but even I 
can't seem to contain the excitement 
pulsing through my veins.
On the other hand…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hehe…… Hahah…… Hahahahahahaha……!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haahahahhahahah!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Man, this is amazing! It really is 
the Japan Derby!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
A stage showcasing the greatest of the 
generation, an apex-level competition…! 
Racing to capture everyone's admiration, 
it's a ruthless battle for supreme glory…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahah…! I've made it…! I'm competing as a Derby horsegirl, this chance is in the palm of my hands…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It's as if this is a dream…!!

…I feel as if some part of my heart 
has misunderstood Stay Gold.

Her attitude had always been aloof since 
our first meeting. Additionally, due to the 
nature of her memories, her existence had 
felt almost enigmatic.

Her attitude as distant as the clouds she 
watched in the sky, until now, I thought 
our free-spirited girl's emotions never 
wavered but ——

This was not the case at all. Seeing 
her today confirmed this.

She surpasses anything I could 
ever do, with insight far beyond 
my comprehension.

Understanding just how hard the Classics 
can be… the crushing regret of being 
unable to run… Despite the insatiable 
yearn for it all.

All the competitors in the Japan Derby 
become horsegirls worthy of admiration. 
There is no substitute, as this is the one 
and only race for glory.

By being able to stand here today, the 
joy that's overflowing from her heart 
is only natural. If that's the case —
choice_data_list: We did it! We've made it all the way here!
We did it! We've made it all the way here!

text_block_list.text:
……I will celebrate for the both of us, 
for the journey that has brought us 
both to this glorious destination.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, you're pretty amazing! Your 
actions spoke louder than your words, 
it's genuinely impressive!
choice_data_list: Stego is also the best! Go defeat your past!
Stego is also the best! Go defeat your past!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! We both did our very best hey!
choice_data_list: Yeah, we really did our best!
Yeah, we really did our best!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Seriously ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …I'm really glad, this was the path I chose.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Let's enjoy this together. It's a 
once in a lifetime race. Also —

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
My souvenir for you will be a title naming 
you as the Trainer of the Japan Derby 
winner, sound good?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I don't think this will be a simple race but… 
look forward to it alright.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Alrighty, it's about time to get going.
—Stego!! We've been waiting for you～～～!!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We all managed to make it here! At this 
Japan Derby! Our Happy Happy Group!!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Fufu. Is this not all thanks to the spring rolls we all shared that time～

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're right! I think my luck has gone crazy good since then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: …Uhm. Let's do our best at today's race together.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah, same here, let's have fun today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Having fun……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru, Bright, you're gonna 
see me in a different light today.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm feeling more amped up 
than ever. I'll be taking this chance 
to go wild.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now there, I won't be letting you take 
the reins so easily! I've made it to the 
Derby, so this ultimate destiny of the 
Heavens will be mine for the taking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Myself included, I plan to be showing 
off the finesse of the Meijiro family 
here at this race～

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
…My place at the front, will not 
be taken by anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Nice. It's gotta be amped up this way…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —Now, shall we begin?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Our very own Japan Derby.
